category_sources: source_facts.description says Java suite of core NLP tools; official CoreNLP site describes NLP annotations including tokenization, NER, parsing, sentiment, and coreference.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official CoreNLP site; official GitHub repository title is Stanford CoreNLP.
docs_sources: Official Stanford CoreNLP documentation is hosted at stanfordnlp.github.io/CoreNLP with API and server documentation pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official CoreNLP docs link to CoreNLP on GitHub, and the GitHub repository describes the Java NLP suite.
tags_sources: Official CoreNLP site and GitHub repository list NLP features including tokenization, named entities, parsing, coreference, and sentiment analysis.
